entities.name: Resume-Death Thesis
entities.context: V's belief that we're at a potentially transformative moment for the industry where traditional resumes are becoming obsolete

entities.name: Holistic Identity Principle
entities.context: Core mission statement: everyone should be seen as the totality of who they are

entities.name: Paradigm Blindness
entities.context: The idea that coaching and qualitative skills are invisible through traditional resume paradigms

entities.name: Qualitative Skills
entities.context: Coaching and soft skills that don't translate well to resume format

relationships.context: Both concepts critique the inadequacy of traditional resumes to capture human value
The mission to see people wholly is blocked by paradigms that hide qualitative attributes
Qualitative skills are specifically what the old paradigm fails to make visible
The mission drives the thesis - if people should be seen wholly, resumes must evolve or die
